nasb.text: Also keep back Your servant from presumptuous sins; Let them not rule over me; Then I will be blameless, And I shall be acquitted of great transgression.

esv.text: Keep back your servant also from presumptuous sins; let them not have dominion over me! Then I shall be blameless, and innocent of great transgression.

cnv.text: 求你攔阻你僕人，不犯任意妄為的罪， 不許它們轄制我； 我才可以完全，不犯大過。

ccb.text: 求你拦阻我， 别让我明知故犯， 别让罪恶辖制我。 这样，我才纯全正直， 免犯大过。

csbs.text: 求你拦阻你仆人，不犯任意妄为的罪， 不要让这些罪辖制我； 这样我就完全，免于大的过犯。
